text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon receives a fan letter apparently
penned by a child.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at this one, Trainer! It says, "My
dream is to run like Tachyon!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The kid's not even an Umamusume, though.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A dream, huh? Don't you find that amusing,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Proclaiming to want the leg power to rival us
mystical Umamusume, how ambitious!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's utterly mad! But, that's what makes it so
interesting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I best write a response right away then,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: To the child with their nigh impossible dream!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, bring me some paper and a pen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I take her letter to a postbox.
Unintentionally, I get a quick glimpse at its
contents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If you desire the leg power of an Umamusume,
research is the key. I am looking forward to your
future achievements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her handwriting was a bit messy, the
message she left was clear.
